description: A designed year-in-review 'policy wins' statistics card with a dark navy gradient background. At the very top, centered, is a header reading '2025 Policy Wins' ('2025' in white serif italic, 'Policy Wins' in bold white sans-serif). The main content sits inside a large rounded off-white/cream panel. Inside, a bold dark heading reads 'Technology / Markets', followed by four bulleted achievement claims in dark text: 'President Trump has solidified the U.S.'s position as the world leader in artificial intelligence, attracting north of $2.7 trillion in tech and AI investment.' (with 'world leader in artificial intelligence' highlighted in yellow); 'President Trump secured $90 billion in groundbreaking AI and energy investments in Pennsylvania.'; 'The stock market surged under President Trump, with the S&P500 hitting 37 record highs, the Nasdaq hitting 36 record highs, and the Dow hitting 18 record highs, including closing above 48,000 for the first time in history.'; 'President Trump directed the creation of an AI Action Plan in the early days of administration, based on accelerating innovation, building infrastructure, and leading in international diplomacy and security.'
notable_text: 2025 Policy Wins; Technology / Markets; world leader in artificial intelligence, $2.7 trillion in tech and AI investment; $90 billion in AI and energy investments in Pennsylvania; S&P500 37 record highs, Dow closing above 48,000; AI Action Plan
